rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban in any curriculum or training surface.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: line 64 prompt lead-in 'the task we ran un-packaged' borderline author-we; reads as student+Claude collective in a prompt context — exempt under rule 6.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 37:'the artefact is the substance.'; 37:'the move you just ran is *diagnosis through named failure modes*, the vocabulary is the lens, the artefact is the substance.'
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Watch for 'substance' as it borders on maintainer/strategy register. Non-blocking observation; primary rule-8 surface is clean.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Rule 2(b) re-amended 2026-05-09 (second pass): bare MN allowed at M2 or later in the training's arc. This is the M5 exercise file — bare M4/M5 in body PASS as curriculum-wide convention. Lowercase path forms (m4/<slug>, m5/<slug>) exempt as paths.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
